name: M79 Grenade Launcher
prompt:
Vietnam War era M79 grenade launcher "Thumper" / "Blooper". Single-shot break-action 40mm grenade launcher.

Physical structure (~0.73m total length):
- Barrel: short fat barrel (~0.35m long, ~0.05m diameter), smooth bore
  - Front sight: blade at muzzle
  - Barrel latch: at top where barrel meets receiver
- Receiver: short action body where barrel pivots
  - Break-action hinge: barrel tips forward to load (show closed)
  - Rear sight: folding leaf sight on top
- Stock: short wooden stock, almost like a large pistol grip extending into buttstock
  - Rubber buttpad
  - Sling swivel at front and rear
- Trigger guard: large trigger guard (can be used with gloves)
- Overall very compact, stubby weapon with oversized barrel

Colors: Parkerized dark (0x3a3a38), wood stock (0x7B5B3A), barrel interior (0x333333)
Orientation: Lying flat, barrel along +Z
Scale: Real-world meters (~0.73m total length)
